policy: Exception layer only — normal PM dispatch remains event-driven on cycle complete. Watchdog fires when factory is stalled, hung, or unhealthy.

triggers.stalled: No cycle event and incomplete sprint work for stall_hours_idle
triggers.no_heartbeat: Active issue but no agent heartbeat for heartbeat_stale_hours
triggers.orchestrator_fail: Last PM orchestrator run failed (reported in factory_state)
triggers.webhook_miss: Cycle event saved locally but webhook not confirmed

recovery_actions.stale_agent: escalate + optional watchdog_recovery if past recovery_cooldown

forbidden: Using watchdog schedule as primary PM dispatch (replaces event-driven flow)
watchdog_recovery without cooldown when last recovery was recent
